eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket prices Columbus Blue Jackets defenseman Zach Werenski as a 90.3% implied probability lock for the James Norris Memorial Trophy, driven by his commanding lead in the NHL.com Trophy Tracker poll released April 14, where he garnered 75% of first-place votes after a late-season surge. Werenski's elite all-around play—22 goals (tops among defensemen in even-strength scoring), 81 points, and carrying a middling Blue Jackets blue line despite their late struggles—has overshadowed Evan Bouchard's league-leading 95 points and +25 rating on playoff-bound Edmonton. Cale Makar trails further amid Colorado's inconsistencies. With Norris finalists announced May 7, a voter revolt favoring Bouchard's raw production or Makar's pedigree could challenge, though polls suggest scant upset potential.

markets.description:
This market will resolve to the contestant who wins Survivor season 50.

If Survivor season 50 concludes without a winner being declared, or if Survivor season 50 has otherwise not concluded by June 30, 2026, 11:59PM ET this market will resolve to "Other". In the case of a tie, this market will resolve in favor of the listed contestant whose name comes first in alphabetical order. 

This market will remain open until the conclusion of the season.

The resolution source for this market will be the official broadcast of the final episode of Survivor season 50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket overwhelmingly favors Aubry Bracco as Survivor 50 winner at 89.5% implied probability, driven by persistent pre-season spoiler leaks from SpoiledSurvivor communities that have accurately predicted every elimination to date, solidifying her as the lock despite a subtle underdog edit. Recent Episode 10 chaos—including a MrBeast "Super Beware" advantage, Rick Devens' beast-mode immunity run, and Aubry's grub-eating auction sacrifice—kept her safely positioned amid the Manulevu tribe's shifting alliances, without eroding her lead. Joe Hunter (4%) and Jonathan Young (2.5%) linger as upset threats if spoilers falter, but with the live finale looming May 20, her strategic subtlety and historical runner-up pedigree fuel the skin-in-the-game bets.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Wellington be 15°C on May 7?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Wellington Intl Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 7 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Wellington Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/nz/wellington/NZWN.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: MetService's latest midday update on May 6 projects an 18°C high for Wellington on May 7 amid partly cloudy conditions, isolated showers tapering by evening, and northerlies strengthening to gale force, elevating trader consensus to a 43% implied probability for 18°C over 17°C at 33.5%. This closely matched positioning reflects genuine forecast uncertainty from variable cloud cover and shower timing, which could suppress peaks if overcast periods dominate midday; conversely, early northerly advection of warmer maritime air supports the higher outcome. Current May 6 readings near 15°C with gusty northerlies align with above-average May norms of 14°C, while continuous airport and Kelburn station observations will soon clarify the maximum.

markets.question: Spread: Eintracht Frankfurt (-2.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Bundesliga game, scheduled for May 8 at 2:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Eintracht Frankfurt" if Eintracht Frankfurt win the game by 3 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "BV Borussia 09 Dortmund".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on bundesliga.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: BV Borussia 09 Dortmund vs. Eintracht Frankfurt - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Bundesliga game, scheduled for May 8 at 2:30 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Borussia Dortmund, sitting second in the Bundesliga standings behind Bayern Munich, host mid-table Eintracht Frankfurt on May 8 at Signal Iduna Park amid a tight title race with 12 games remaining. Dortmund's recent form shows vulnerability after losses to Bayer Leverkusen (0-1 on April 11) and Hoffenheim (1-2 on April 18), but they secured a 2-0 win over VfB Stuttgart earlier in April; key striker Serhou Guirassy has returned to training ahead of tomorrow's Freiburg clash, boosting attack despite absences like Niklas Süle and Karim Adeyemi. Frankfurt, eighth with mixed results including a 1-3 home defeat to RB Leipzig last weekend and a 2-1 win at Wolfsburg, face defensive woes from injuries to Nnamdi Collins (season-ending), Rasmus Kristensen (ankle), and Ansgar Knauff. Dortmund hold a strong head-to-head edge, winning recent encounters, with home advantage and Frankfurt's injury crisis shaping trader consensus toward the hosts in this pivotal late-season matchup.

markets.question: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (LOW) $40 by end of June?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, on any trading day, the official CME settlement price for the Active Month (front month) of Crude Oil (CL) futures is equal to or below the listed price by the final trading day of June 2026. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No".

For CME Crude Oil (CL) futures contracts, the active month is the nearest of the contract months listed. The active month becomes a non-active month effective two business days prior to the spot month expiration. For example; if the spot month expires on a Friday the next listed contract will be considered the Active Month on the Wednesday prior to the spot month expiration.

Only the Active Month's official settlement price published by CME Group will be considered. Intraday trades, highs, lows, bids, offers, midpoint values, or indicative prices do not count.

Note that the settlement price may differ from the last traded price. CME's methodology to determine the settlement price can vary by commodity and contract.

Only days on which CME publishes an official settlement price for the Active Month will be included. Days without settlement prices (weekends, holidays, or market closures) are ignored.

This market will resolve based on the settlement price as it appears on the CME settlement page at the time it is first published for that trading day, regardless of any later corrections or updates.

The resolution source for this market is the CME Group website — specifically, the daily "Settlement" price for the Active Month of Crude Oil (CL) futures.

eventMetadata.context_description: WTI crude oil (CL) front-month futures settled at $102.27 per barrel on May 5, 2026, trading around $100.38 early May 6 amid a pullback from recent highs above $105, driven by de-escalation in US-Iran tensions in the Strait of Hormuz following an exchange of fire earlier this week. Year-to-date prices have surged over 85% on persistent Middle East geopolitical risk premiums, compounded by Q1 military actions that tightened supply perceptions. EIA's Short-Term Energy Outlook anticipates a Q2 Brent peak near $115/bbl before easing on rising US exports and potential OPEC+ adjustments, with trader consensus pricing elevated volatility. Key catalysts include weekly EIA inventory reports—due Thursdays—and the June 7 OPEC+ meeting on output for June implementation, which could sway end-June price thresholds.

markets.question: Will Coinbase Global, Inc. (COIN) hit (HIGH) $215 in May?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during May 2026, any 1-minute candle for Coinbase Global, Inc. (COIN) has a final "High" price equal to or above the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Coinbase Global, Inc. (COIN) "High" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.COIN%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.COIN%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily high price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

events.title: What will Coinbase Global, Inc. (COIN) hit in May 2026?
events.description: What will Coinbase Global, Inc. (COIN) hit in May 2026?

eventMetadata.context_description: Coinbase Global (COIN) shares hover near $198, buoyed by Bitcoin's surge past $80,000 that lifted the stock over 6% in the latest session amid heightened crypto trading volumes. Q1 2026 earnings due May 7 represent the primary catalyst, with Wall Street consensus projecting EPS of $0.36—down 81% year-over-year—and revenue near $1.5 billion, pressured by softer spot market activity despite 61% growth in stablecoin revenue to $364 million. Analyst targets average $262, reflecting optimism on institutional adoption and regulatory tailwinds, though lawsuits introduce volatility risks. Early in May, macroeconomic risk appetite and post-earnings guidance will dictate share price trajectory toward key thresholds.

events.description: More markets for the La Liga 2 game, scheduled for May 8 at 2:30 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: RC Deportivo La Coruña, entrenched in second place in LaLiga Hypermotion standings with 64 points from a strong run of wins and draws—including a 3-1 victory over Mirandés last weekend and a 1-1 draw at Burgos on April 25—enter Jornada 39 as promotion contenders against relegation-battling Cádiz CF, mired in 18th on 38 points. Cádiz's winless streak over five matches features heavy losses like 3-0 to Sporting Gijón and 3-0 at Real Valladolid, exacerbated by injuries to key attackers Javi Ontiveros (groin), Suso (muscle), and Bojan Kovacevic (knee). The earlier season 2-2 draw at Riazor highlights Cádiz's home fightback potential, but Deportivo's away form and table position drive trader sentiment toward the visitors.

markets.question: FC Bayern München vs. Paris Saint-Germain FC: O/U 10.5 Total Corners
markets.description: In the upcoming UEFA Champions League game between FC Bayern München and Paris Saint-Germain FC, scheduled for May 6, 2026 at 3:00 PM ET: This market will resolve to "Over" if there are 11 or more total corners awarded in this game (combining corners for both teams). If the total number of corners is fewer than 11, this market will resolve to "Under". If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50. This market refers only to corners awarded within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time. Corners awarded during extra time or penalty shootouts do not count. The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 24 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: FC Bayern München vs. Paris Saint-Germain FC - Total Corners
events.description: Total corners markets for the UEFA Champions League game between FC Bayern München and Paris Saint-Germain FC, scheduled for May 6, 2026 at 3:00 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trailing 4-5 on aggregate after PSG's thrilling 5-4 first-leg victory, Bayern Munich hosts the Champions League semi-final return leg at Allianz Arena, where home attacking pressure and crowd support could drive elevated corner volume. The opener saw just seven total corners (Bayern 5-2), but both sides average around 5.5-6.5 corners per UCL match this season amid wide play from wingers like Dembélé, Kvaratskhelia, Olise, and Davies. PSG's key right-back Achraf Hakimi is out with a thigh injury sustained in the first leg, weakening overlaps and exposing flanks to Bayern crosses. Expect end-to-end action as Bayern chase advancement, contrasting their Bundesliga average of 9.9 total corners per game.

markets.question: Will New England Patriots win the 2026 AFC East?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the team that is declared as the AFC East division champion for the 2026 NFL regular season.

If multiple teams tie atop the division, this market will resolve according to the official tiebreak procedure of the NFL.

If the 2026 NFL regular season is cancelled, postponed after January 17, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, or there is otherwise no winner declared for this division within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the NFL; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus favors the Buffalo Bills at 55.5% implied probability to win the AFC East, driven by their strong 2026 NFL Draft class including EDGE T.J. Parker and CB Davison Igbinosun, bolstering pass rush alongside free-agent addition Bradley Chubb and trade acquisition DJ Moore to support Josh Allen after the Patriots snapped their streak in a 14-3 2025 campaign. New England Patriots hold a competitive 35.5% as defending division champs with QB Drake Maye maturing, trading up for OT Caleb Lomu and EDGE Gabe Jacas to protect the pocket amid a tough schedule. Jets' draft haul (EDGE David Bailey at No. 2) lifts them to 8.5%, while Dolphins' volume picks fail to overcome injury concerns, stranding them at 6.3%.

markets.question: Series: Anyone's Legend Kill Handicap (-10.5) vs Weibo Gaming (+10.5)
markets.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Anyone's Legend and Weibo Gaming in the LPL Group Ascend, scheduled for January 20 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Anyone's Legend" if Anyone's Legend secures 11 or more kills than Weibo Gaming in the match. 

Otherwise, it will resolve to "Weibo Gaming".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: The iShares MSCI South Korea ETF (EWY), trading near $163 as of early May 2026, reflects robust trader consensus on South Korea's semiconductor-led rebound, with year-to-date gains exceeding 61% amid KOSPI's record close at 6,937 following a 5% surge.
